Come along on Monday afternoon and Wednesday morning to ‘Wellbeing at Wesleys’ for a warm welcome, someone to talk to and some optional mindful activities – or join in one of the many other activity groups that meet in our premises throughout the week.Signposting to information and advice services. Free use of wifi.
